findings.issue: Task refers to writeEntry as a reusable helper ('хелпер writeEntry') in Context Files and Implementation hints. In report/report_test.go writeEntry is NOT a package-level helper — it is a local closure redefined inside each test (report_test.go:462 in Test_app_doReport, report_test.go:678 in Test_app_doReport_procpidstat). The new test file cannot import/reuse it; it must define its own. The task body does say to 'copy the structure', so this is non-blocking, but the wording is slightly misleading.
findings.fix: Clarify that writeEntry is a per-test local closure to be re-created in the new test file, not a shared helper to call. The package-level `update` flag (report_test.go:22) IS shared and correctly noted as not to be redeclared.
